title: Senior Financial Analyst - Bajaj Finance - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Bajaj Finance - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Bajaj Finance in Bhopal is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Bajaj Finance:
Bajaj Finance is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Finance!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
